# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent monitoring misconfiguration.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: '3'
services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:7.10.2
    container_name: elasticsearch
    environment:
      - node.name=elasticsearch
      - cluster.name=my-cluster
      - discovery.type=single-node
      - xpack.security.enabled=true
      - xpack.security.authc.realms.file.enabled=true
      - xpack.security.authc.realms.file.order=0
      - xpack.security.authc.realms.file.type=file
      - xpack.security.authc.realms.file.filename=/usr/share/elasticsearch/config/users_roles.yml
    volumes:
      - ./data:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
    ports:
      - 9200:9200
    networks:
      - elk-network
  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:7.10.2
    container_name: logstash
    environment:
      - LOGSTASH_VERSION=7.10.2
      - xpack.security.enabled=true
      - xpack.security.authc.realms.file.enabled=true
      - xpack.security.authc.realms.file.order=0
      - xpack.security.authc.realms.file.type=file
      - xpack.security.authc.realms.file.filename=/usr/share/logstash/config/users_roles.yml
    volumes:
      - ./data:/usr/share/logstash/data
    ports:
      - 5044:5044
    networks:
      - elk-network
  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:7.10.2
    container_name: kibana
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_URL=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - xpack.security.enabled=true
      - xpack.security.authc.realms.file.enabled=true
      - xpack.security.authc.realms.file.order=0
      - xpack.security.authc.realms.file.type=file
      - xpack.security.authc.realms.file.filename=/usr/share/kibana/config/users_roles.yml
    volumes:
      - ./data:/usr/share/kibana/data
    ports:
      - 5601:5601
    networks:
      - elk-network
  apm-server:
    image: docker.elastic.co/apm/apm-server:7.10.2
    container_name: apm-server
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_URL=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - xpack.security.enabled=true
      - xpack.security.authc.realms.file.enabled=true
      - xpack.security.authc.realms.file.order=0
      - xpack.security.authc.realms.file.type=file
      - xpack.security.authc.realms.file.filename=/usr/share/apm-server/config/users_roles.yml
    volumes:
      - ./data:/usr/share/apm-server/data
    ports:
      - 8200:8200
    networks:
      - elk-network
networks:
  elk-network:
    driver: bridge
